channel.title: TCB Pest Control Canberra — Blog
channel.description: Practical, seasonal pest control advice for Canberra and the ACT, written by the technicians who do the work.

item.title: Why Pest Control in Canberra is So Important
item.description: Bushland, climate and the way the city is built — why the ACT keeps pest pressure turned up year-round, and what that means for your home.

item.title: A Guide to Canberra's Most Common Spiders
item.description: Funnel-webs, white-tails, redbacks, huntsmen and trapdoors — how to ID the species most likely to show up in your home or garden, and what to do next.

item.title: Termite Prevention Tips for Canberra Homeowners
item.description: Warning signs, the value of annual inspections, and what a sensible termite plan looks like for a block in the ACT — from a family-run local team.

item.title: Keeping European Wasps Out of Your Garden This Summer
item.description: How to recognise them, where they nest, why the danger is real, and the prevention and removal approach that actually works.

item.title: Rat and Mouse Pest Control in the Canberra Autumn
item.description: Why roof rats come inside in colder months, the early warning signs worth catching, and what an effective autumn treatment plan looks like.

item.title: How Pest Control Makes Your Workplace Safer
item.description: Compliance, audit-ready reporting and the scheduling that keeps trading hours intact — for hospitality, retail, strata and office sites.
